notes: Two-leg cointegration pairs trade (Engle-Granger rolling-OLS hedge ratio over a 504-bar formation window, spread z-score over a 60-bar trailing window, |z|>=2.0 entry, |z|<=0.25 mean-band exit, |z|>=4.0 safety stop, time stop = min(3*half_life, 90) D1 bars). Cointegration qualified deterministically per closed D1 bar: spread std>0, bounded AR(1) mean-reversion speed lambda<0, half-life in [2,60] bars; no statistics/ML library, no external feed. Three pairs registered as host/partner slot pairs: EURUSD/GBPUSD (slots 0/1), AUDUSD/NZDUSD (slots 2/3), XAUUSD/XAGUSD (slots 4/5). Each instance trades a host leg via the framework magic and the partner leg via QM_BasketOpenPosition at the partner's registered slot; both legs open/close together, partner opened first so a failed partner aborts the pair (no naked leg). Spread computed in-EA from host+partner .DWX D1 closes only. All six legs are native .DWX symbols verified present in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv — NO port needed. Set strategy_partner_symbol + strategy_partner_slot + qm_magic_slot_offset per-setfile to select the pair.
